case_title: COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE vs. FLANAGAN, ALVIN

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, ALVIN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, ALVIN $1,597.47 PRINCIPAL, $1,581.23 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,201.70, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE#046202 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE & APPL. FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE SERVED NOV-17-2000, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, ALVIN
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 12/26/00, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
